meaning: 1. lotus flower (Nelumbo nucifera Gaertn, among others); 2. water-lily
sentence: 池塘里开满了粉色的莲花。
pinyin: Chítáng lǐ kāi mǎn le fěnsè de liánhuā.
english: The pond is covered in pink lotus flowers in bloom.

sentence: 他把电脑的各个组件重新安装了一遍。
pinyin: Tā bǎ diànnǎo de gège zǔjiàn chóngxīn ānzhuāng le yī biàn.
english: He reinstalled all the computer components one by one.

sentence: 这门技艺出现了传承上的断层。
pinyin: Zhè mén jìyì chūxiàn le chuánchéng shàng de duàncéng.
english: There is a gap in the transmission of this traditional craft.

sentence: 她不意间发现了这个秘密。
pinyin: Tā bùyì jiān fāxiàn le zhège mìmì.

meaning: 1. (of a large number of things) to form an expanse; 2. to cover an ar
sentence: 春天一到，花园里的郁金香成片地开放。
pinyin: Chūntiān yī dào, huāyuán lǐ de yùjīnxiāng chéngpiàn de kāifàng.
english: When spring arrives, the tulips in the garden bloom in great swaths.
